mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_skill_execution_log (skill_id, skill_code, module_key, input_params, output_result, tokens_prompt, tokens_completion, duration_ms, status, error_message, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{skillId}, #{skillCode}, #{moduleKey}, #{inputParams}, #{outputResult}, #{tokensPrompt}, #{tokensCompletion}, #{durationMs}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
